\begin{document}
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; \hrulefill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; \bf [問題] あるお百姓さんが、大八車を引きながら村はずれの川の西の岸にやってきた。
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; \bf 大八車には、荒縄でくくられたキャベツと背負い駕篭に入ったニワトリが積まれ
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; \bf ていた。明日は隣村に市が立つので、その市でキャベツとニワトリを売ろうとい
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; \bf うわけである。その後を、お百姓さんにすっかりなついてしまったキツネのコン
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; \bf 太が、いかにもニワトリを食べたそうなそぶりて、着いて来ていた。
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;};
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; さて、川のほとりには一艘の小さな船がつないであった。この船で、お百姓さん
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; はニワトリ、キャベツ、キツネのすべてを川の東の岸へ運ばなければならない。
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; 困ったことに、この船は大変小さかったので、船をあやつるお百姓さん以外に
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; 一度に運べるのは、ニワトリ、キャベツ、キツネのうちのどれか一つだけだった。
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; ところが、腹のへったニワトリは、お百姓さんがいなくなるとキャベツを食べて
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; しまい、さらにキツネのコン太はお百姓さんが目を離すと、ニワトリを食べてし
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; まう。
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; \bf どうやったら、お百姓さんは首尾良くニワトリ、キャベツ、キツネのすべてを東
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; \bf 側の岸に運べるだろうか？
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; \sc farmer+hen.scm \ by \ Kazuo AMANO
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; east-side-state is represented by list $(w\ x\ y\ z)$ where each $w, x, y, z = 0$ or $1$
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; example:
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; \null$$\eqalign{(1\ 1\ 1\ 1) &= {\rm (farmer\ hen\ cabbage\ fox)-state}\cr (0\ 1\ 0\ 1) &= {\rm (none\ hen\ none\ fox)-state}\cr (1\ 0\ 1\ 0) &= {\rm (farmer\ none\ cabbage\ none)-state}\cr}$$
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; initial-state = (1 1 1 1)
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; state-sequence = (... state2 state1 initial-state)
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}; state-tree = (... state-sequece2 state-sequence1 state-sequence0)
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}  西から東への移動
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}(\textbf{define}{\tt\mc \ }(west{\tt -}{\tt >}east{\tt\mc \ }x{\tt\mc \ }seq)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{let}*{\tt\mc \ }((y{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{car}{\tt\mc \ }seq)){\tt\mc \ }(fa{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{car}{\tt\mc \ }y)){\tt\mc \ }(he{\tt\mc \ }(cadr{\tt\mc \ }y)){\tt\mc \ }(ca{\tt\mc \ }(caddr{\tt\mc \ }y)){\tt\mc \ }(fo{\tt\mc \ }(cadddr{\tt\mc \ }y)))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{cond}{\tt\mc \ }((={\tt\mc \ }fa{\tt\mc \ }0){\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{cons}{\tt\mc \ }'(){\tt\mc \ }seq))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(else{\tt\mc \ }(cond{\tt\mc \ }((and{\tt\mc \ }(equal?{\tt\mc \ }x{\tt\mc \ }'hen){\tt\mc \ }(={\tt\mc \ }he{\tt\mc \ }1)){\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{cons}{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{list}{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }ca{\tt\mc \ }fo){\tt\mc \ }seq))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }((\textbf{and}{\tt\mc \ }(equal?{\tt\mc \ }x{\tt\mc \ }'cabbage){\tt\mc \ }(={\tt\mc \ }ca{\tt\mc \ }1)){\tt\mc \ }(cons{\tt\mc \ }(list{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }he{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }fo){\tt\mc \ }seq))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }((and{\tt\mc \ }(equal?{\tt\mc \ }x{\tt\mc \ }'fox){\tt\mc \ }(={\tt\mc \ }fo{\tt\mc \ }1)){\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{cons}{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{list}{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }he{\tt\mc \ }ca{\tt\mc \ }0){\tt\mc \ }seq))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{else}{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{cons}{\tt\mc \ }'(){\tt\mc \ }seq)))))))

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{};{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }東から西への移動

\noindent
\mbox{}(define{\tt\mc \ }(west{\tt <}{\tt -}east{\tt\mc \ }x{\tt\mc \ }seq)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(let*{\tt\mc \ }((y{\tt\mc \ }(car{\tt\mc \ }seq)){\tt\mc \ }(fa{\tt\mc \ }(car{\tt\mc \ }y)){\tt\mc \ }(he{\tt\mc \ }(cadr{\tt\mc \ }y)){\tt\mc \ }(ca{\tt\mc \ }(caddr{\tt\mc \ }y)){\tt\mc \ }(fo{\tt\mc \ }(cadddr{\tt\mc \ }y)))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(cond{\tt\mc \ }((={\tt\mc \ }fa{\tt\mc \ }1){\tt\mc \ }(cons{\tt\mc \ }'(){\tt\mc \ }seq))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{else}{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{cond}{\tt\mc \ }((\textbf{and}{\tt\mc \ }(equal?{\tt\mc \ }x{\tt\mc \ }'hen){\tt\mc \ }(={\tt\mc \ }he{\tt\mc \ }0)){\tt\mc \ }(cons{\tt\mc \ }(list{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\mc \ }ca{\tt\mc \ }fo){\tt\mc \ }seq))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }((and{\tt\mc \ }(equal?{\tt\mc \ }x{\tt\mc \ }'cabbage){\tt\mc \ }(={\tt\mc \ }ca{\tt\mc \ }0)){\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{cons}{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{list}{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\mc \ }he{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\mc \ }fo){\tt\mc \ }seq))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }((\textbf{and}{\tt\mc \ }(equal?{\tt\mc \ }x{\tt\mc \ }'fox){\tt\mc \ }(={\tt\mc \ }fo{\tt\mc \ }0)){\tt\mc \ }(cons{\tt\mc \ }(list{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\mc \ }he{\tt\mc \ }ca{\tt\mc \ }1){\tt\mc \ }seq))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }((equal?{\tt\mc \ }x{\tt\mc \ }'none){\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{cons}{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{list}{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\mc \ }he{\tt\mc \ }ca{\tt\mc \ }fo){\tt\mc \ }seq))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{else}{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{cons}{\tt\mc \ }'(){\tt\mc \ }seq)))))))

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{};{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }終了の判定をする関数

\noindent
\mbox{}(define{\tt\mc \ }(finished?{\tt\mc \ }tree)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(let{\tt\mc \ }finished1?{\tt\mc \ }((x{\tt\mc \ }tree))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(cond{\tt\mc \ }((null?{\tt\mc \ }x){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\#}f)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }((equal?{\tt\mc \ }(caar{\tt\mc \ }x){\tt\mc \ }'(0{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }0)){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\#}t)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{else}{\tt\mc \ }(finished1?{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{cdr}{\tt\mc \ }x))))))

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}  不適当な branch を切り落とす関数
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}(\textbf{define}{\tt\mc \ }(rm{\tt -}bad{\tt -}seq{\tt\mc \ }tree)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{let}{\tt\mc \ }rm{\tt -}bad{\tt -}seq1{\tt\mc \ }((x{\tt\mc \ }tree){\tt\mc \ }(y{\tt\mc \ }'()))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(cond{\tt\mc \ }((null?{\tt\mc \ }x){\tt\mc \ }y)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }((null?{\tt\mc \ }(caar{\tt\mc \ }x)){\tt\mc \ }(rm{\tt -}bad{\tt -}seq1{\tt\mc \ }(cdr{\tt\mc \ }x){\tt\mc \ }y))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }((equal?{\tt\mc \ }(caar{\tt\mc \ }x){\tt\mc \ }'(1{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\mc \ }0)){\tt\mc \ }(rm{\tt -}bad{\tt -}seq1{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{cdr}{\tt\mc \ }x){\tt\mc \ }y))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }((equal?{\tt\mc \ }(caar{\tt\mc \ }x){\tt\mc \ }'(1{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }1)){\tt\mc \ }(rm{\tt -}bad{\tt -}seq1{\tt\mc \ }(cdr{\tt\mc \ }x){\tt\mc \ }y))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }((equal?{\tt\mc \ }(caar{\tt\mc \ }x){\tt\mc \ }'(0{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\mc \ }0)){\tt\mc \ }(rm{\tt -}bad{\tt -}seq1{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{cdr}{\tt\mc \ }x){\tt\mc \ }y))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }((equal?{\tt\mc \ }(caar{\tt\mc \ }x){\tt\mc \ }'(0{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }1)){\tt\mc \ }(rm{\tt -}bad{\tt -}seq1{\tt\mc \ }(cdr{\tt\mc \ }x){\tt\mc \ }y))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }((equal?{\tt\mc \ }(caar{\tt\mc \ }x){\tt\mc \ }'(1{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\mc \ }1)){\tt\mc \ }(rm{\tt -}bad{\tt -}seq1{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{cdr}{\tt\mc \ }x){\tt\mc \ }y))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{else}{\tt\mc \ }(rm{\tt -}bad{\tt -}seq1{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{cdr}{\tt\mc \ }x){\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{cons}{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{car}{\tt\mc \ }x){\tt\mc \ }y))))))

\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}  branch を成長させる関数
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}(\textbf{define}{\tt\mc \ }(mkseq{\tt\mc \ }seq)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(rm{\tt -}bad{\tt -}seq

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{list}{\tt\mc \ }(west{\tt -}{\tt >}east{\tt\mc \ }'hen{\tt\mc \ }seq){\tt\mc \ }(west{\tt -}{\tt >}east{\tt\mc \ }'cabbage{\tt\mc \ }seq){\tt\mc \ }(west{\tt -}{\tt >}east{\tt\mc \ }'fox{\tt\mc \ }seq)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(west{\tt <}{\tt -}east{\tt\mc \ }'hen{\tt\mc \ }seq){\tt\mc \ }(west{\tt <}{\tt -}east{\tt\mc \ }'cabbage{\tt\mc \ }seq){\tt\mc \ }(west{\tt <}{\tt -}east{\tt\mc \ }'fox{\tt\mc \ }seq)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(west{\tt <}{\tt -}east{\tt\mc \ }'none{\tt\mc \ }seq))))

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{};{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }手順の{\tt\mc \ }tree{\tt\mc \ }を作る関数

\noindent
\mbox{}(define{\tt\mc \ }(mktree{\tt\mc \ }initial{\tt -}state)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(let{\tt\mc \ }mktree1{\tt\mc \ }((x{\tt\mc \ }(list{\tt\mc \ }(list{\tt\mc \ }initial{\tt -}state))))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(cond{\tt\mc \ }((finished?{\tt\mc \ }x){\tt\mc \ }x)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(else{\tt\mc \ }(mktree1{\tt\mc \ }(let{\tt\mc \ }mktree2{\tt\mc \ }((x1{\tt\mc \ }x){\tt\mc \ }(x2{\tt\mc \ }'()))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{cond}{\tt\mc \ }((null?{\tt\mc \ }x1){\tt\mc \ }x2)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{else}{\tt\mc \ }(mktree2{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{cdr}{\tt\mc \ }x1){\tt\mc \ }(append{\tt\mc \ }x2{\tt\mc \ }(mkseq{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{car}{\tt\mc \ }x1))))))))))))

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt ;}  main 関数
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}(\textbf{define}{\tt\mc \ }(main{\tt -}func)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{let}{\tt\mc \ }display{\tt -}answer{\tt\mc \ }((x{\tt\mc \ }(mktree{\tt\mc \ }'(1{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\mc \ }1{\tt\mc \ }1))))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(cond{\tt\mc \ }((null?{\tt\mc \ }x){\tt\mc \ }(newline))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(else{\tt\mc \ }(cond{\tt\mc \ }((equal?{\tt\mc \ }(caar{\tt\mc \ }x){\tt\mc \ }'(0{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }0)){\tt\mc \ }(display{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{car}{\tt\mc \ }x)){\tt\mc \ }(newline)))

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }(display{\tt -}answer{\tt\mc \ }(\textbf{cdr}{\tt\mc \ }x))))))
